model: v24deploy_wc5 (3-seed, retrained 2026-07-09 on all 96 WC2026 results through the Round of 16) — 0.5*transformer + 0.5*confed-adjusted draw-aware Elo (neutral, confirmed-XI)

lineups.spain: 4-2-3-1: Unai Simon; Pedro Porro, Pau Cubarsi, Aymeric Laporte, Marc Cucurella; Rodri, Pedri; Lamine Yamal, Dani Olmo, Alex Baena; Mikel Oyarzabal
lineups.belgium: 4-2-3-1: Thibaut Courtois; Timothy Castagne, Nathan Ngoy, Brandon Mechele, Maxim De Cuyper; Hans Vanaken, Youri Tielemans; Jeremy Doku, Kevin De Bruyne, Leandro Trossard; Charles De Ketelaere

staking_method: half-Kelly capped at 8% of settled bankroll (standing rule since 2026-07-07, see bankroll.md): full-Kelly fraction 0.034, half-Kelly 0.017 (well under the 0.08 cap). 0.017 x EUR122.04 = EUR2.07, rounded up to EUR3.00
note: Only +EV leg: Spain win EV -8.58%, Draw EV -9.36%, both excluded. Book overround 4.89%. Odds sit near the longshot-caution boundary (~6.0) but edge treated as genuine per project rule (clean XI data both sides).
